proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T5](x0: T2 -> T1, x1: Category[T2, T0], x2: Category[T1, T5], x3: T0 -> T5) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x1.src(x4)) = x2.src(x3(x4)) } = functor_src_axiom[T2, T0, T1, T5](x1, x2, x0, x3) }[M1, O2, O1, M2](f.obj_map, opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.mor_map)
let w0: M1 satisfy { opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).src(f.mor_map(w0)) != f.obj_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).src(w0)) }
function(x0: M1) { opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).src(f.mor_map(x0)) = f.obj_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).src(x0)) }(w0)

function[T0, T1, T2, T5](x0: T2 -> T1, x1: Category[T2, T0], x2: Category[T1, T5], x3: T0 -> T5) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x1.dst(x4)) = x2.dst(x3(x4)) } = functor_dst_axiom[T2, T0, T1, T5](x1, x2, x0, x3) }[M1, O2, O1, M2](f.obj_map, opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.mor_map)
let w0: M1 satisfy { opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).dst(f.mor_map(w0)) != f.obj_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).dst(w0)) }
function(x0: M1) { opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).dst(f.mor_map(x0)) = f.obj_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).dst(x0)) }(w0)

function[T0, T1, T2, T5](x0: T2 -> T1, x1: Category[T0, T2], x2: Category[T5, T1], x3: T0 -> T5) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x1.identity(x4)) = x2.identity(x3(x4)) } = functor_identity_axiom[T0, T2, T5, T1](x1, x2, x3, x0) }[O1, M2, M1, O2](f.mor_map, opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map)
let w0: O1 satisfy { opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).identity(f.obj_map(w0)) != f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).identity(w0)) }
function(x0: O1) { opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).identity(f.obj_map(x0)) = f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).identity(x0)) }(w0)

goal: opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).compose(p, q) = opposite_compose[O1, M1](f.src_cat, p, q)
opposite_compose[O1, M1](f.src_cat, p, q) = f.src_cat.compose(q, p)
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O1, M1](f.src_cat, p, q)

goal: opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).compose(f.mor_map(p), f.mor_map(q)) = opposite_compose[O2, M2](f.dst_cat, f.mor_map(p), f.mor_map(q))
opposite_compose[O2, M2](f.dst_cat, f.mor_map(p), f.mor_map(q)) = f.dst_cat.compose(f.mor_map(q), f.mor_map(p))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O2, M2](f.dst_cat, f.mor_map(p), f.mor_map(q))

goal: f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).compose(p, q)) = opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).compose(f.mor_map(p), f.mor_map(q))

proof: function[T0, T1, T3, T5](x0: Category[T1, T0], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: Category[T5, T3], x3: T1 -> T5) { forall(x4: T0, x5: T0) { x0.src(x4) != x0.dst(x5) or x1(x0.compose(x4, x5)) = x2.compose(x1(x4), x1(x5)) } = functor_compose_axiom[T1, T0, T5, T3](x0, x2, x3, x1) }[M1, O1, M2, O2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), f.mor_map, opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map)

let w0: M1 satisfy { exists(k0: M1) { opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).src(w0) = opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).dst(k0) and f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).compose(w0, k0)) != opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).compose(f.mor_map(w0), f.mor_map(k0)) } }

let w1: M1 satisfy { opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).src(w0) = opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).dst(w1) and f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).compose(w0, w1)) != opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).compose(f.mor_map(w0), f.mor_map(w1)) }

let w2: M1 satisfy { opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).src(w0) = opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).dst(w2) and f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).compose(w0, w2)) != opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).compose(f.mor_map(w0), f.mor_map(w2)) }

function(x0: M1, x1: M1) { opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).dst(x0) != opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).src(x1) or opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat).compose(f.mor_map(x1), f.mor_map(x0)) = f.mor_map(opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat).compose(x1, x0)) }(w2, w0)

goal: is_functor[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map) = (functor_src_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map) and functor_dst_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map) and functor_identity_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map) and functor_compose_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: Category[T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T3) { (functor_src_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3) and functor_dst_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3) and functor_identity_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3) and functor_compose_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3)) = is_functor[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map)

goal: functor_src_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map)

proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: Category[T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T3) { Functor.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3) = is_functor[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_category[O1, M1](f.src_cat), opposite_category[O2, M2](f.dst_cat), f.obj_map, f.mor_map)

goal: functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](src_op, dst_op) = (src_op.src_cat = dst_op.src_cat and src_op.dst_cat = dst_op.dst_cat)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_cat = x1.src_cat and x0.dst_cat = x1.dst_cat) = functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](src_op, dst_op)

goal: nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](src_op, dst_op, n.component) = forall(x0: O1) { src_op.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) = src_op.obj_map(x0) and src_op.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) = dst_op.obj_map(x0) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3]) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.src(x1(x3)) and x2.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.dst(x1(x3)) } = nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T2, T1, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[O1, O2, M1, M2](src_op, n.component, dst_op)

goal: nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](src_op, dst_op, n.component)
proof: let w0: O1 satisfy { not (src_op.obj_map(w0) = src_op.dst_cat.src(n.component(w0)) and dst_op.obj_map(w0) = src_op.dst_cat.dst(n.component(w0))) }
function(x0: O1) { src_op.obj_map(x0) = src_op.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) and dst_op.obj_map(x0) = src_op.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) }(w0)

proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O2, M2](n.dst_functor.dst_cat, n.component(n.src_functor.src_cat.src(m)), n.dst_functor.mor_map(m))

function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O2, M2](n.dst_functor.dst_cat, n.src_functor.mor_map(m), n.component(n.src_functor.src_cat.dst(m)))

goal: nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](src_op, dst_op, n.component) = forall(x0: M1) { src_op.dst_cat.compose(n.component(src_op.src_cat.dst(x0)), src_op.mor_map(x0)) = src_op.dst_cat.compose(dst_op.mor_map(x0), n.component(src_op.src_cat.src(x0))) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x1: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x2: T3 -> T1) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.dst_cat.compose(x1.mor_map(x3), x2(x0.src_cat.src(x3))) = x0.dst_cat.compose(x2(x0.src_cat.dst(x3)), x0.mor_map(x3)) } = nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T3, T0, T2, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[M1, M2, O2, O1](src_op, dst_op, n.component)

goal: nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](src_op, dst_op, n.component)
proof: let w0: M1 satisfy { src_op.dst_cat.compose(dst_op.mor_map(w0), n.component(src_op.src_cat.src(w0))) != src_op.dst_cat.compose(n.component(src_op.src_cat.dst(w0)), src_op.mor_map(w0)) }
function(x0: M1) { src_op.dst_cat.compose(dst_op.mor_map(x0), n.component(src_op.src_cat.src(x0))) = src_op.dst_cat.compose(n.component(src_op.src_cat.dst(x0)), src_op.mor_map(x0)) }(w0)

goal: nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_functor[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.dst_functor), opposite_functor[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor), n.component)

proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](opposite_functor[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.dst_functor), opposite_functor[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor), n.component)
